APIError.description: APIError is an api error with a message

repositories.description:
Indicates that an access token only has access to the specified repositories.  Will be null if the access token
is not limited to a set of specified repositories.

AccessToken.title: AccessToken represents an API access token.

ScheduleID.description: the cron id for the schedule trigger

commit_sha.description: the commit sha the action run ran on

created.description: when the action run was created

event.description: the webhook event that causes the workflow to run

event_payload.description: the payload of the webhook event that causes the workflow to run

html_url.description: the url of this action run

index_in_repo.description: a unique number for each run of a repository

is_fork_pull_request.description: If this is triggered by a PR from a forked repository or an untrusted user, we need to check if it is approved and limit permissions when running the workflow.

is_ref_deleted.description: has the commit/tag/… the action run ran on been deleted

need_approval.description: may need approval if it's a fork pull request

prettyref.description: the commit/tag/… the action run ran on

started.description: when the action run was started

status.description: the current status of this run

stopped.description: when the action run was stopped

trigger_event.description: the trigger event defined in the `on` configuration of the triggered workflow

updated.description: when the action run was last updated

ActionRunJob.description: ActionRunJob represents a job of a run

attempt.description: How many times the job has been attempted including the current attempt.

handle.description: Opaque identifier that uniquely identifies a single attempt of a job.

needs.description: the action run job needed ids

runs_on.description: the action run job labels to run on

task_id.description: the action run job latest task id

ActionVariable.description: ActionVariable return value of the query API

owner_id.description: the owner to which the variable belongs

repo_id.description: the repository to which the variable belongs

BranchProtection.description: BranchProtection represents a branch protection for a repository

CombinedStatus.description: CombinedStatus holds the combined state of several statuses for a single commit

Comment.description: Comment represents a comment on a commit or issue

created_at.description: The time of the comment's creation

html_url.description: The HTML URL of the comment

issue_url.description: The HTML URL of the issue if the comment is posted on an issue, else empty string

original_author.description: The original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else empty string

original_author_id.description: The ID of the original author that posted the comment if it was not posted locally, else 0

pull_request_url.description: The HTML URL of the pull request if the comment is posted on a pull request, else empty string

updated_at.description: The time of the comment's update

Commit.title: Commit contains information generated from a Git commit.

CommitAffectedFiles.description: CommitAffectedFiles store information about files affected by the commit

CommitMeta.title: CommitMeta contains meta information of a commit in terms of API.

CommitStats.description: CommitStats is statistics for a RepoCommit

CommitStatus.description: CommitStatus holds a single status of a single Commit

CommitStatusState.description:
CommitStatusState holds the state of a CommitStatus
It can be "pending", "success", "error", "failure" and "warning"

CommitUser.title: CommitUser contains information of a user in the context of a commit.

Compare.title: Compare represents a comparison between two commits.

ContentsResponse.description: ContentsResponse contains information about a repo's entry's (dir, file, symlink, submodule) metadata and content

content.description: `content` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

encoding.description: `encoding` is populated when `type` is `file`, otherwise null

submodule_git_url.description: `submodule_git_url` is populated when `type` is `submodule`, otherwise null

target.description: `target` is populated when `type` is `symlink`, otherwise null

Duration.description:
A Duration represents the elapsed time between two instants
as an int64 nanosecond count. The representation limits the
largest representable duration to approximately 290 years.

ExternalTracker.description: ExternalTracker represents settings for external tracker

external_tracker_format.description: External Issue Tracker URL Format. Use the placeholders {user}, {repo} and {index} for the username, repository name and issue index.

external_tracker_regexp_pattern.description: External Issue Tracker issue regular expression

external_tracker_style.description: External Issue Tracker Number Format, either `numeric`, `alphanumeric`, or `regexp`

ExternalWiki.description: ExternalWiki represents setting for external wiki

FileLinksResponse.description: FileLinksResponse contains the links for a repo's file

GPGKey.description: GPGKey a user GPG key to sign commit and tag in repository

GPGKeyEmail.description: GPGKeyEmail an email attached to a GPGKey

GeneralAPISettings.description: GeneralAPISettings contains global api settings exposed by it

GeneralRepoSettings.description: GeneralRepoSettings contains global repository settings exposed by API

GeneralUISettings.description: GeneralUISettings contains global ui settings exposed by API

GitHook.description: GitHook represents a Git repository hook

InternalTracker.description: InternalTracker represents settings for internal tracker

allow_only_contributors_to_track_time.description: Let only contributors track time (Built-in issue tracker)

enable_issue_dependencies.description: Enable dependencies for issues and pull requests (Built-in issue tracker)

Issue.description: Issue represents an issue in a repository

IssueFormFieldType.title: IssueFormFieldType defines issue form field type, can be "markdown", "textarea", "input", "dropdown" or "checkboxes"

IssueFormFieldVisible.description: IssueFormFieldVisible defines issue form field visible

IssueTemplate.description: IssueTemplate represents an issue template for a repository

Label.description: Label a label to an issue or a pr

LicenseTemplateInfo.description: LicensesInfo contains information about a License

LicensesTemplateListEntry.description: LicensesListEntry is used for the API

ListActionRunResponse.description: ListActionRunResponse return a list of ActionRun

Milestone.description: Milestone milestone is a collection of issues on one repository

NewIssuePinsAllowed.description: NewIssuePinsAllowed represents an API response that says if new Issue Pins are allowed

NodeInfo.description: NodeInfo contains standardized way of exposing metadata about a server running one of the distributed social networks

NodeInfoServices.description: NodeInfoServices contains the third party sites this server can connect to via their application API

NodeInfoSoftware.description: NodeInfoSoftware contains Metadata about server software in use

NodeInfoUsage.description: NodeInfoUsage contains usage statistics for this server

NodeInfoUsageUsers.description: NodeInfoUsageUsers contains statistics about the users of this server

Note.description: Note contains information related to a git note

NotifySubjectType.description: NotifySubjectType represent type of notification subject

OrganizationPermissions.description: OrganizationPermissions list different users permissions on an organization

PayloadCommitVerification.description: PayloadCommitVerification represents the GPG verification of a commit

PayloadUser.description: PayloadUser represents the author or committer of a commit

name.description: Full name of the commit author

Permission.description: Permission represents a set of permissions

PublicKey.description: PublicKey publickey is a user key to push code to repository

review_comments.description: number of review comments made on the diff of a PR review (not including comments on commits or issues in a PR)

PullRequestMeta.description: PullRequestMeta PR info if an issue is a PR

PullReview.description: PullReview represents a pull request review

PushMirror.description: PushMirror represents information of a push mirror

QuotaGroupList.description: QuotaGroupList represents a list of quota groups

QuotaInfo.description: QuotaInfo represents information about a user's quota

QuotaRuleInfo.description: QuotaRuleInfo contains information about a quota rule

limit.description: The limit set by the rule

name.description: Name of the rule (only shown to admins)

QuotaUsed.description: QuotaUsed represents the quota usage of a user

QuotaUsedArtifact.description: QuotaUsedArtifact represents an artifact counting towards a user's quota

html_url.description: HTML URL to the action run containing the artifact

QuotaUsedArtifactList.description: QuotaUsedArtifactList represents a list of artifacts counting towards a user's quota

QuotaUsedAttachment.description: QuotaUsedAttachment represents an attachment counting towards a user's quota

contained_in.description: Context for the attachment: URLs to the containing object

api_url.description: API URL for the object that contains this attachment

html_url.description: HTML URL for the object that contains this attachment

QuotaUsedAttachmentList.description: QuotaUsedAttachmentList represents a list of attachment counting towards a user's quota

QuotaUsedPackage.description: QuotaUsedPackage represents a package counting towards a user's quota

html_url.description: HTML URL to the package version

QuotaUsedPackageList.description: QuotaUsedPackageList represents a list of packages counting towards a user's quota

QuotaUsedSize.description: QuotaUsedSize represents the size-based quota usage of a user

QuotaUsedSizeAssets.description: QuotaUsedSizeAssets represents the size-based asset usage of a user

artifacts.description: Storage size used for the user's artifacts

QuotaUsedSizeAssetsAttachments.description: QuotaUsedSizeAssetsAttachments represents the size-based attachment quota usage of a user

issues.description: Storage size used for the user's issue & comment attachments

releases.description: Storage size used for the user's release attachments

QuotaUsedSizeAssetsPackages.description: QuotaUsedSizeAssetsPackages represents the size-based package quota usage of a user

all.description: Storage suze used for the user's packages

QuotaUsedSizeGit.description: QuotaUsedSizeGit represents the size-based git (lfs) quota usage of a user

LFS.description: Storage size of the user's Git LFS objects

QuotaUsedSizeRepos.description: QuotaUsedSizeRepos represents the size-based repository quota usage of a user

private.description: Storage size of the user's private repositories

public.description: Storage size of the user's public repositories

RepoCommit.title: RepoCommit contains information of a commit in the context of a repository.

RepoTransfer.description: RepoTransfer represents a pending repo transfer

has_wiki_contents.description: have wiki pages ever been created

object_format_name.description: ObjectFormatName of the underlying git repository

ServerVersion.description: ServerVersion wraps the version of the server

SyncForkInfo.description: SyncForkInfo information about syncing a fork

TagArchiveDownloadCount.description: TagArchiveDownloadCount counts how many times a archive was downloaded

Team.description: Team represents a team in an organization

TimelineComment.description: TimelineComment represents a timeline comment (comment of any type) on a commit or issue

ref_commit_sha.description: commit SHA where issue/PR was referenced

removed_assignee.description: whether the assignees were removed or added

TopicName.description: TopicName a list of repo topic names

TrackedTime.description: TrackedTime worked time for an issue / pr

html_url.description: URL to the user's profile page

source_id.description: The ID of the user's Authentication Source

visibility.description: User visibility level option: public, limited, private

UserHeatmapData.description: UserHeatmapData represents the data needed to create a heatmap
